mapper.insert: insert into community_takeout ( user_id, user_name, user_phone, user_room, order_no, shop_name, shop_phone, total_amount, delivery_fee, actual_amount, order_status, payment_method, payment_time, delivery_time, actual_delivery_time, delivery_address, remark, cancel_reason, reservation_id, complaint_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{userId}, #{userName}, #{userPhone}, #{userRoom}, #{orderNo}, #{shopName}, #{shopPhone}, #{totalAmount}, #{deliveryFee}, #{actualAmount}, #{orderStatus}, #{paymentMethod}, #{paymentTime}, #{deliveryTime}, #{actualDeliveryTime}, #{deliveryAddress}, #{remark}, #{cancelReason}, #{reservationId}, #{complaintId}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: update community_takeout set user_id = #{userId}, user_name = #{userName}, user_phone = #{userPhone}, user_room = #{userRoom}, order_no = #{orderNo}, shop_name = #{shopName}, shop_phone = #{shopPhone}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, delivery_fee = #{deliveryFee}, actual_amount = #{actualAmount}, order_status = #{orderStatus}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, payment_time = #{paymentTime}, delivery_time = #{deliveryTime}, actual_delivery_time = #{actualDeliveryTime}, delivery_address = #{deliveryAddress}, remark = #{remark}, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, reservation_id = #{reservationId}, complaint_id = #{complaintId}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from community_takeout where id in
#{id}
